name: Arimaa
author: AGP
description: Arimaa (Omar Syed, 2002), the famous anti-computer abstract on an 8x8 board with four trap squares (c3, f3, c6, f6). Each side has an Elephant, Camel, 2 Horses, 2 Dogs, 2 Cats and 8 Rabbits in the strength order E>M>H>D>C>R. Players first DEPLOY all 16 pieces freely on their own two home rows, then take turns of up to FOUR one-square steps. A stronger piece may PUSH or PULL an adjacent weaker enemy (2 steps each); a piece next to a stronger enemy with no friendly neighbour is FROZEN; a piece on a trap with no friendly neighbour is captured. Win by getting a Rabbit to the far rank, capturing all enemy Rabbits, or immobilizing the opponent. Gold moves first.
